news.t: HF Foods Adopts Limited Duration Stockholder Rights Plan
Days Global Advisors to Change Listing Exchange of HF ETF to NYSE

overview.description: The DGA Core Plus Absolute Return ETF (HF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in multi-strategy alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that invests in unaffiliated US-listed ETFs without any limitation to geography or asset classes. The fund aims for long-term capital appreciation and preservation by applying an absolute return approach through a proprietary, analytical investment model. HF was launched on Aug 2, 2023 and is issued by DGA.
